sections.label: Macro
sections.body: BTC chops -0.45% 24h with breadth halved to 6/20 since morning. The no-Fed-easing-2026 consensus tightens against AI-driven equity records, and Iran ceasefire optimism still compresses the energy and shipping risk premia. BTC reads its own ETF register while equities ride earnings momentum. Two risk channels run separately on different fuel.

sections.label: Perps
sections.body: 27 assets assessed, regime quiet. BNB and ASTER hold accumulation structure day 2 with taker buy slipping under 50% on both, and the BSC cluster cracked intraday as the morning bid rolled negative. PLAY printed the only fresh momentum signal at +57% 24h on +116% OI, a small-cap leverage rip without a thesis. Four breakout setups (STG, HOME, PORTAL, BinanceLife) stacked into the 52% taker-buy gate together without clearing. A single hour clearing the gate promotes the first one to fire.

sections.label: Book
sections.body: HYPE printed a fresh ATH at $70.99 today on $1.1B vol. The morning long fires per plan and sustained spot above $70 arms the sector-narrative gate. BNB accumulation conviction crumbles day 2 with taker buy slipping further under 50%, OI rolled to -2.24%, smart money long/short cut to 1.13. The named risk fires straight into tomorrow's June 1 VanEck ETF window. ICP and SEI carry the multi-week structural holds through the chop.

market_sentiment.bias_line: Bias · ride HYPE through the ATH extension. BNB on tight watch into the June 1 ETF window. No new entries. Four near-miss breakouts stacked under the taker gate without clearing. WLD's incentive bid faded inside the same session it was added.

current_positions.thesis_note: MISSION70 supply-deflation thesis structural and multi-week, AI agents 5/5 narrative still extends runway
current_positions.watch: ICP $2.731 bounced +2.90% 24h off the recent low. The structural deflation thesis is multi-week and bid-independent. A second daily close below $2.70 with the AI-compute cohort red into the close marks the structural break.

current_positions.thesis_note: June 15 EVM migration sits 15 days out, Xiaomi distribution scales to 20K+ retail in Q2
current_positions.watch: SEI $0.0676 +1.92% 24h on PM perps, roughly flat from entry. The June 15 EVM migration window sits firmly ahead. The L1 sector quiet without fresh threats to the catalyst-driven thesis.

current_positions.thesis_note: Fresh ATH $70.99 confirms the breakout, sustained spot above $70 arms the sector-narrative gate
current_positions.watch: HYPE printed a fresh ATH at $70.99 today on $1.1B vol and held above $70 into PM perps at $70.84. Funding warmed to +0.009%/8h from morning's +0.0062%/8h with OI +5.34% 24h tracking the structural build. The next test is whether the bid holds the $70 level against the crowded-trade chatter cluster forming at the milestone.

current_positions.thesis_note: Accumulation conviction crumbling but VanEck ETF announcement window arrives tomorrow June 1, the dated catalyst the trade was sized for
current_positions.watch: BNB $707.34 -1.62% 24h on PM perps, -1.77% from entry. Accumulation conviction crumbling day 2: taker buy slipped to 48.60% (was 49.14% AM), smart money long/short cut to 1.13 (-0.30 7d), OI rolled to -2.24% 24h after the morning's +5.84% build. The named risk that fast money trims as retail piles in is firing. BNB-chain cluster split intraday with BinanceLife and KOGE ripping fresh legs while BNB, CAKE and ASTER all closed red. VanEck spot BNB ETF announcement window is tomorrow June 1. A daily close below $700 with the cluster continuing to fade promotes to CLOSE before the news pop fizzles.

watchlist.trigger: next session taker buy prints above 52% with the +48% 24h leg holding into the daily close
watchlist.invalidation: close below $0.009 before the trigger fires
thesis: PORTAL held the day-2 watch with +48.68% 24h, OI +61.22%, and short liquidations of $1.0M against the 7d 75th-percentile of $101K — forced cover stacked on top of fresh long flow.

Taker buy at 50.60% sits 1.4 points under the 52% breakout-confirmation gate. The leverage pile built into the print and funding stays negative at -0.235%/8h — shorts pay through every funding window.
A single hourly print clearing 52% with the +48% leg holding into the daily close confirms continuation. Without it the fresh-listing OI stack unwinds through forced long flush.

watchlist.trigger: taker buy clears 52% on a single hour with the +72% 24h leg holding above $0.36
watchlist.invalidation: close below $0.30 before the trigger fires
thesis: Stargate Finance fired +72% 24h on volume 27.94x average with OI exploding 262% in the same window. Funding sits at -0.3847%/8h, the deepest short-pay across today's perps universe.
Top-trader long/short at 0.71 with -0.07 7d delta means shorts kept rebuilding into the rip and got forced out. Taker buy 51.39% sits half a point under the 52% breakout-confirmation gate.
A single hourly print clearing 52% with the OI extension holding promotes the short-squeeze leg. Without it the +262% OI stack unwinds back through the breakout level.

watchlist.trigger: funding crosses +0.08%/8h with a daily close negative on OI still building
watchlist.invalidation: close above $0.33 before the trigger fires
thesis: ALLO ran +210% over 7 days with funding warming to +0.0288%/8h while top-trader long/short fell 0.63 points in the same window — distribution into retail demand, the smart-exit pattern.
pct_4h flipped to -0.41% intraday while pct_24h held +15.94%. The first cooling signal under a parabolic structure where funding has not yet hit the distribution gate.
Funding crossing +0.08%/8h with daily close negative confirms the distribution. Before then the parabolic still has fuel from the funding cushion and OI builds without exhaustion.

evaluations.note: Day 5/multi-week PM eval. ICP $2.731 +2.90% 24h on PM perps slice, the first up day after several sessions of bleed. MISSION70 supply-deflation thesis is structural and multi-week, AI agents 5/5 RIDE w/ trail and Physical AI NEW 2/5 Emerging WATCH extend the runway. Stop $2.65 sits 3% below. RIDE on tight watch — a second daily close below $2.70 with the AI-compute cohort red into close marks the structural break.

Day 5/multi-week PM eval. SEI $0.0676 +1.92% 24h on PM perps slice — re-entered the universe at NEUTRAL after dropping out of the morning's set. Position roughly flat from $0.0697 entry with the $0.062 stop 8% below. June 15 EVM migration sits 15 days out, the dated catalyst window firmly ahead. L1 sector quiet today with no fresh threat to the structural thesis. RIDE.

Day 2/multi-week PM eval. HYPE printed a fresh ATH at $70.99 today on $1.1B vol (token-movers PM TRENDING+UP MAJOR day-3) and held above $70 into PM perps at $70.84. Position +6.67% from $66.41 entry. Funding warmed to +0.009%/8h from morning's +0.0062%/8h with OI +5.34% 24h tracking the structural build. AIXBT PM names HYPE flipping DOGE for top-10 market cap with the community debate splitting at the milestone ($100+ bulls vs crowded-trade warnings). Per soul when the community splits at the milestone rather than loading through it, the easy leg is done — trail tightens here even as RIDE holds. Stop $58 sits 18% below. RIDE — sustained spot above $70 into Asia open promotes to ride-with-conviction.

Day 2/7 PM eval. BNB $707.34 -1.62% 24h on PM perps, -1.77% from $720.09 entry. ACCUMULATION DIVERGENT day 2 with the conviction crumbling — taker buy slipped further to 48.60% (was 49.14% AM), smart money long/short cut to 1.13 (-0.30 7d), OI rolled to -2.24% 24h after the morning's +5.84% build. The named risk that fast money trims as retail piles in is firing across every read. BNB-chain cluster split intraday with BinanceLife (+28.6%) and KOGE/BNB48 Club (+35%) ripping fresh narrative legs while BNB, CAKE and ASTER all closed red — operator ticker rotation matching the documented sol-cluster pattern. VanEck spot BNB ETF announcement window is tomorrow June 1, the dated catalyst the trade was sized for. Stop $670 sits 5% below. RIDE on tight watch — a daily close below $700 with the cluster continuing to fade promotes to CLOSE before the news pop fizzles.

add_watchlist.trigger: taker buy clears 52% on a single hour with the +72% 24h leg holding above $0.36
add_watchlist.invalidation: close below $0.30 before the trigger fires

invalidation_conditions.trigger_label: OI stack unwinds back through the breakout

thesis: STG fired +72% 24h on vol 27.94x with OI exploding 262% in the same window. Funding -0.3847%/8h is the deepest short-pay across the assessed universe.
Top-trader long/short at 0.71 with -0.07 7d delta means shorts rebuilt into the rip and got forced out. Taker buy 51.39% sits half a point under the 52% breakout-confirmation gate.
A single hourly print clearing 52% with the OI extension holding promotes the squeeze leg. Without it the +262% OI stack unwinds back through the breakout.
named_risks: OI +262% 24h is structurally late — the leverage stack rolling over without taker confirmation prints a violent long flush rather than the squeeze continuation.

add_watchlist.trigger: funding crosses +0.08%/8h with a daily close negative on OI still building
add_watchlist.invalidation: close above $0.33 before the trigger fires

conditions.trigger_label: first negative daily close on the run

invalidation_conditions.trigger_label: parabolic extension continues, fade thesis broken

thesis: ALLO ran +210% over 7 days with funding warming to +0.0288%/8h while top-trader long/short fell 0.63 points — distribution into retail demand, the smart-exit pattern.
pct_4h flipped to -0.41% intraday while pct_24h held +15.94%. The first cooling signal under a parabolic structure where funding has not yet hit the distribution gate.
Funding crossing +0.08%/8h with daily close negative confirms the distribution. Before then the parabolic still has fuel from the funding cushion.
named_risks: Parabolic runs that haven't hit funding extremes can extend further — the +210% leg may add another leg before the smart-money exit completes.
ALLO sits in the small-cap leverage rip cohort. A fresh narrative catalyst (DeFi build, listing) could pull the rip into a fresh leg before the fade fires.

drop_watchlist.note: Oku Trade incentive bid faded inside the same session WLD was added. Price touched $0.408 intraday then reversed to $0.3432 (-5.9% 24h) without the reclaim above $0.40 with volume the trigger required. The named risk that reward-cycle activity pulls forward demand and fades played out cleanly. The structural setup for a long is broken — a fresh on-chain catalyst would warrant re-engagement, but the original thesis is exhausted within one session.
